Transcrição Completa: Raising The Clients Interest Level

[00:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "18 Raising The Clients Interest Level"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Título com gráficos de níveis de interesse subindo

[00:02] You as the salesperson, you have to have a sustained high level of conviction in order for a sale to occur. You cannot in any way, shape or form capitulate to the other party's level.

[00:15] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Interest Level Dynamic"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Gráfico mostrando vendedor (alto interesse) vs cliente (baixo interesse)

[00:18] So, you as the salesperson going into the deal, your interest levels are going to be high. The potential client, they are going to have low interest levels.

[00:28] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Deal Happens When Both Interests Peak"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Dois gráficos se encontrando no topo - ambas partes com alto interesse

[00:32] So to be clear, a deal happens when both parties interests are peaked. So you as the salesperson, your interest levels have to be as high as they can possibly be, aka your conviction about your product.

[00:45] You're going to come across resistance obviously when you're talking to people.

[00:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Why Clients Enter With Low Interest"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Razões para baixo interesse: problema, curiosidade, validação social

[00:55] Now to be clear, a client enters into the deal. They might have a little bit of interest. Maybe they have the problem that your product or service solves. Maybe they just have a general interest or curiosity around understanding what it is that you do.

[01:10] Maybe some of their friends bought your product and they're trying to figure out why people bought your product so they can justify it themselves.

[01:18] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "The Cardinal Rule: Never Lower Your Level"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Seta descendente riscada - nunca baixe sua convicção

[01:22] Well, watch this. The client's interest level comes in low. So, when you talk to somebody who naturally has a low interest level and you have to get their interest level higher in order for a deal to actually occur, what does that mean?

[01:35] That means you cannot lower your interest level. You cannot lower your conviction rate to their level.

[01:42] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Full Conviction Required"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Vendedor 100% convencido sobre preço, benefícios, valor

[01:45] You should be fully sold on why your product costs as much as it does, why it is the way it is, and why it's going to be beneficial for the client.

[01:55] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Step-by-Step Interest Elevation"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Escada subindo: feature by feature, objection by objection

[02:00] And when you are dealing with somebody who has a lower level of interest than yours, and you continue to explain yourself feature by feature, overcoming objection by objection, what happens is one step at a time, you're moving the client's interest level up.

[02:15] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Recognizing the Shift"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Mudança de tonalidade, menos resistência, mais curiosidade

[02:18] And you likely recognize this. All of a sudden, the tonality changes in the individual. You can hear it in their voice that there's a little more interest and a little more curiosity. There's a little less resistance than there was at the beginning point of the conversation.

[02:35] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Sustained Conviction = Rising Interest"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Sua convicção sustentada eleva o interesse do cliente

[02:40] Their interest will raise because your level of conviction and interest was sustained. If you lower your interest level, the client will lower their interest level.

[02:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "Game of Capitulation"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Jogo de capitulação - quem cede primeiro perde

[02:55] It is a game of capitulating to one another. When they enter in, if you waver on the bar of interest you have set, you will be pulled down to their level and no deal occurs.

[03:05] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO

─────────────────────────────

TEXTO: "The Only Way Sales Happen"

NÚMEROS: None

VISUAL: Ambas partes no mesmo nível de acordo = deal fechado

[03:08] The only time that a deal occurs is when you maintain your level of conviction about why the person needs that product, service, or offer. And in doing so, you will raise their level of interest in order for a deal to eventually occur.

[03:22] There is no other way a sale happens. A sale happens when both parties are at the same level of agreement with one another. Then a deal gets done.

[03:30] If you capitulate to their level that they enter into the deal with, you will not get a deal. Keep your conviction insanely high about what it is that you are selling and why the person on the other end of that phone needs it. Otherwise, once again, a deal won't occur.

🔥 ANÁLISE FURION POWER: Jeremy revela a FÍSICA BRUTAL das vendas! Esta é pura CIÊNCIA do comportamento humano - vendas são um jogo de energia onde quem cede primeiro PERDE. Jeremy destrói vendedores fracos que se rebaixam ao nível do cliente. A metáfora da capitulação é DEVASTADORA - você é um GENERAL que não pode mostrar fraqueza. Jeremy entende que convicção é CONTAGIOSA - sua certeza inabalável força o prospect a subir ao seu nível. Pura DOMINÂNCIA psicológica!
